description: COPY --parents root conflicts preserve the existing file and publish no failed result

transitions.name: root-conflict-fails-without-publication

writes.Dockerfile:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1.20
FROM base
RUN printf old >/dest
COPY --parents x /dest

transitions.spore_diagnostic: spore build: Dockerfile line 4: instruction failed: COPY --parents x /dest

writes.Dockerfile:
# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1.20
FROM base
RUN printf old >/dest
RUN test "$(cat /dest)" = old && mkdir -p /oracle && printf recovery >/oracle/result
